headline: How The Prologis (PLD) Investment Story Is Evolving As Valuation And Fundamentals Converge
summary: The fair value estimate for Prologis holds steady at US$141.9, with no shift in the central price target coming out of the latest model update. That muted change is broadly consistent with recent Street commentary, where optimism around industrial REIT fundamentals is balanced by questions about how much upside is already reflected in the current share price. As you read on, you will see how this steady target fits into the broader bullish and bearish narrative and what to watch as that story...
